mnemonics: DEEDS: Decomposition, Embarrassing Parallelism, Dependencies, Estimation, Synchronization
keyPoints: The primary goal is performance through concurrency.
Decomposition (partitioning work) is the fundamental task of parallel programming.
Understanding and managing dependencies is critical to correctness.
commonMistakes: Assuming more processors always leads to a linear speedup (Amdahl's Law).
Over-synchronizing, which can serialize execution and kill performance.
Focusing only on computation time and ignoring communication costs.
